title: Habitat Studio Run Runtime Authority Closure
forbids: Run in Game runtime packet closure while structural authority rows SA-01 through SA-13 are missing or obscured by unresolved packet-local temporary rules
why: Packet 14 closes the authority-set topology by verifying the registered matrix, owners, manifests, empty baselines, and removal of temporary rules. One Nx workspace policy graph executes the two owner-local Habitat targets; this leaf does not orchestrate sibling checks.
remediate: Register the owning SA-01 through SA-13 Habitat rules, restore their matrix and empty baseline contracts, remove or promote packet-local temporary rules, then rerun the workspace policy graph.
message: Studio Run in Game runtime authority closure is incomplete.
